query: SELECT date_label, COUNT(*) as count, MIN(created_at) as first, MAX(created_at) as last FROM research_reports WHERE date_label >= '2026-05-18' GROUP BY date_label ORDER BY date_label DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT date_label, COUNT(*) as count, MIN(created_at) as first, MAX(created_at) as last FROM research_reports WHERE date_label >= '2026-05-18' GROUP BY date_label ORDER BY date_label DESC LIMIT 5;
